unit.name: Kett
unit.gameplay_identity: Brawler calibration unit carrying Striker, Cartel through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.strongest_preserved_hook: one wage-stamp prosthetic fist with three plates
unit.dominant_prop_or_anatomy: one wage-stamp prosthetic fist with three plates
unit.supernatural_cost: each punch embosses debt coin reliefs into bone and reduces finger motion

psychology.core_wound: A cartel made his labor, debt, and public humiliation indistinguishable until violence was the only action they acknowledged.
psychology.private_want: He wants one impact powerful enough to restore the dignity he cannot ask for directly.
psychology.primary_fear: A complex problem will expose him as helpless and return him to public humiliation.
psychology.survival_strategy: He reduces every injury and insult to a sequence of three solvable blows.
psychology.villainous_distortion: He makes other bodies absorb every humiliation he cannot name or negotiate.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Controlled labor rage with anticipatory relief at the coming impact.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Rigid restraint versus desperate desire to feel simple physical release.
psychology.face_direction: Eyes hold a grievance rather than generic anger; lips stay compressed, one cheek twitches toward relief, and the jaw aligns behind the loaded fist.
psychology.pose_direction: The wage-stamp fist owns the forward mass while the smaller hand and trailing body remain deliberately subordinate.
psychology.forbidden_read: No generic bruiser, cheerful worker, superhero fist, armored tank, mindless rage, or ornamental coin-and-chain gangster.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Controlled labor rage with anticipatory relief at the coming impact.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: He wants one impact powerful enough to restore the dignity he cannot ask for directly.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: A complex problem will expose him as helpless and return him to public humiliation.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: He reduces every injury and insult to a sequence of three solvable blows.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: He makes other bodies absorb every humiliation he cannot name or negotiate.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Face cue: Eyes hold a grievance rather than generic anger; lips stay compressed, one cheek twitches toward relief, and the jaw aligns behind the loaded fist. Pose cue: The wage-stamp fist owns the forward mass while the smaller hand and trailing body remain deliberately subordinate.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares kett directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for kett: A mature industrial brawler and controlled villain read instantly without superhero polish.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, kett meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for kett: Tarred cloth, oxidized metal, bruised skin, and workwear retain grounded dry texture.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, kett meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for kett: The wage-stamp fist owns the composition; every body angle supports the coming impact.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, kett meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for kett: Industrial debt-fist construction separates him from tanks, goblins, and conventional bruisers.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, kett meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, kett meets or exceeds the professional floor for completeness_and_downstream_usability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for kett: The disproportionate fist and barrel body remain among the clearest exact-96 silhouettes.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, kett meets or exceeds the professional floor for psychology_and_villain_read.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, kett meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
